rules.title: Assign payer_type for each member per year
rules.body: This macro pulls medical coverage records from the APCD member table and assigns a payer_type for each member per year. Runs separately for Commercial, Medicaid, Medicare Advantage, and Medicare FFS. Adjust the year list and source table as needed.

rules.title: Pull dental coverage for Medicaid and Commercial per year
rules.body: Pulls Medicaid dental members with age-based plan eligibility filters, then Commercial dental members with the ME020_DentalServicesIndicator flag. Stacks both into a single dent_all_&yr. table. Adjust the year parameter and source table as needed.

rules.title: Stack, classify, and deduplicate race and ethnicity across years
rules.body: Stacks member records across years, classifies race and ethnicity using ME021 and ME025 codes, replaces MCD QHP race/ethnicity with HCIP values where available, then rank-deduplicates by studyid to produce a single cross-year demographics reference table.

rules.title: Assign county based on most-recently-updated record per year
rules.body: County should be assigned based on the most-recently-updated county per year — not per quarter, unless the project requires quarterly granularity. The ZIP-to-county crosswalk is in geoinfo.clean_county_xwalk.
